basic_details.job_title: IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Hotel Management, Ahmedabad (IHM Ahmedabad) Teaching Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.ihmahmadabad.com. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Upper age limit is relaxable as per the GOI rules from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: NHTET with NCHMCT percentage, Full time Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration from a recognized University (60% marks), Full time Master's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration (60% marks), At least 2 years industry experience
qualification.details: Must have passed the NHTET with NCHMCT percentage conducted by NCHMCT. Full time Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration from a recognized University and full time Master's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration securing not less than 60% marks in aggregate either in bachelor's or master's degree. OR Full time Bachelor's Degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration after +2 from a recognized University securing not less than 60% marks in aggregate with at least 2 years industry experience.

selection_process: Teaching Ability test Subject Skill test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ihmahnedabad.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the IHM Ahmedabad Teaching Associate recruitment is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Teaching Associate post announced by the Institute of Hotel Management, Ahmedabad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have passed NHTET with NCHMCT percentage, a Bachelor's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration (60% marks), and a Master's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration (60% marks), or a Bachelor's degree with 2 years of industry experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for this recruitment through the Offline mode by sending their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General and OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 200/-. Details for other categories are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Teaching Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Teaching Ability test and a Subject Skill test to evaluate the candidates' suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any industry experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, at least 2 years of industry experience is required if you are applying with a Bachelor's degree in Hospitality & Hotel Administration without a Master's degree.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of IHM Ahmedabad, www.ihmahnedabad.com. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Teaching Associate position?
faq.answer: The Teaching Associate position is on a Contractual basis.
